title: Gender Mod Epic Fight Compat
description: Epic Fight compatibility for Wildfire's Gender Mod
body:
**Epic Fight has now added their own integration so this mod is no longer necessary for Epic Fight 20.14.16 or 21.16.3+**

Compatibility for Epic Fight with Wildfire's Female Gender Mod
This was made fairly quickly so there might be some issues but it's definitely better.
This mod requires [Female Gender Mod 3.2.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender) and [Epic Fight 21.15.7](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
There is 1 config option for the first person rendering.
![Holding 2 daggers from epic fight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c90d2790efb190c4c1c193c35a6273fe503b9546.png)
